title: Storage and Battery
drDigitalIntro:
Check what's using your storage and battery.
• Storage shows what's taking up space — large files and apps.
• Battery shows time left and offers Low Power Mode.
• Low on space? Delete old files or apps you don't use.

playgroundTask.instructions: Your computer battery is running low. Open Battery settings and turn on Low Power Mode.

drDigitalSuccess: Low Power Mode reduces background activity to stretch your battery life — useful when you can't plug in.
drDigitalHint: Open Battery in Settings and look for the Low Power Mode toggle.
